title: 生物圈震惊：00后在自家客厅完成基因组测序，27亿美元壁垒崩塌
description: 一个 USB 大小的测序仪，几个人工智能模型——00 后 Seth Howes 在自家客厅里完成了基因组测序，单枪匹马破解了困扰他家人数十年的自身免疫性疾病之谜。
titleZh: 生物圈震惊：00后在自家客厅完成基因组测序，27亿美元壁垒崩塌
titleEn: Biosphere Shocker: A Post-00s Guy Completes Genome Sequencing in His Living Room, the $2.7 Billion Barrier Collapses
descriptionZh: 一个 USB 大小的测序仪，几个人工智能模型——00 后 Seth Howes 在自家客厅里完成了基因组测序，单枪匹马破解了困扰他家人数十年的自身免疫性疾病之谜。
descriptionEn: A USB-sized sequencer, a few AI models—Post-00s guy Seth Howes completed genome sequencing right in his living room, single-handedly cracking the mystery of an autoimmune disease that had plagued his family for decades. In 2003, the cost of sequencing a complete human genome was $2.7 billion; he did it for just $1,100!
